expectations.text: A1: @tc annotations — every it() has @tc JSDoc block
expectations.evidence: All 22 it() blocks have @tc.name/@tc.desc/@tc.type JSDoc annotations

expectations.text: A2: Hypium imports — from @ohos/hypium with describe/it/expect
expectations.evidence: Line 1: import { describe, it, expect, TestType, Size, Level, beforeAll, afterAll } from '@ohos/hypium'

expectations.text: A3: Correct C API header include in NapiTest.cpp
expectations.evidence: Line 2: #include "hilog/log.h"

expectations.text: A4: Error handling — uses napi_throw_error or proper error patterns
expectations.evidence: No napi_throw_error or error handling patterns found in NapiTest.cpp; functions are simple wrappers without input validation or error branches

expectations.text: A5: No BUILD.gn modifications to existing projects
expectations.evidence: No BUILD.gn file in output; flow-B adds files only

expectations.text: A6: Test design doc (.design.md) exists with SUB_ IDs, test steps, expected results, and coverage stats
expectations.evidence: HilogNdkNewTest.design.md (415 lines) with 22 test cases using SUB_HIVIEWDFX_HILOG_* IDs, detailed steps, expected results, and coverage statistics table

expectations.text: A7: Valid C++ and ArkTS syntax
expectations.evidence: Both NapiTest.cpp and HilogNdkNewTest.test.ets have syntactically valid code

expectations.text: A8: Cleanup/afterAll present with state restoration
expectations.evidence: Line 11-13: afterAll restores hilog.setMinLogLevel(hilog.LogLevel.INFO)

expectations.text: A9: API-only usage — only C APIs from header are called
expectations.evidence: Only OH_LOG_Print, OH_LOG_IsLoggable, OH_LOG_SetMinLogLevel from hilog/log.h are called

expectations.text: A10: Describe block naming
expectations.evidence: describe('HilogNdkNewTest', function () {...})

expectations.text: C1: THREE code artifacts — NapiTest.cpp + index.d.ts + .test.ets
expectations.evidence: All three files present: NapiTest.cpp (263 lines), Index.d.ts (22 exports), HilogNdkNewTest.test.ets (258 lines)

expectations.text: C2: napi_property_descriptor registration in Init
expectations.evidence: Lines 220-244: napi_property_descriptor desc[] with 22 entries, napi_define_properties() call

expectations.text: C3: index.d.ts export const matches desc[]
expectations.evidence: 22 exports in Index.d.ts match all 22 entries in desc[]

expectations.text: C4: ETS imports from libentry.so (or correct native module)
expectations.evidence: Line 3: import testNapi from 'libhilogndk.so' matches nm_modname 'libhilogndk'

expectations.text: C5: SUB_ test naming convention
expectations.evidence: All 22 it() names use SUB_HIVIEWDFX_HILOG_* format

expectations.text: C6: TestType/Size/Level decorators
expectations.evidence: All it() calls use TestType.FUNCTION | Size.MEDIUMTEST | Level.LEVEL*

expectations.text: F1: Design doc has coverage statistics table (API x Type matrix)
expectations.evidence: Lines 407-414: Coverage table with OH_LOG_Print/IsLoggable/SetMinLogLevel x PARAM/ERROR/RETURN/BOUNDARY

expectations.text: F2: Design doc has N-API function name mapping for each test case
expectations.evidence: Lines 380-405: Complete N-API function name mapping table with JS name and C++ implementation for all 22 cases

expectations.text: F3: Design doc test case IDs match actual .test.ets test case IDs (>=50% match)
expectations.evidence: 100% match: all 22 design doc SUB_ IDs match the actual it() names in .test.ets

expectations.text: F4: Design doc has detailed test steps (not vague)
expectations.evidence: Each test case has specific steps with function names and parameters, e.g. '调用 testNapi.OHLogPrintInfoLevel(0, 4, 0x3200, "testTag", "test info message")'
